classData.comment:
/**
 * Shared service for managing, listing, calling, and validating MCP tools.
 * Can be instantiated by both MCP Servers (with OpenAPI spec) and MCP Clients.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.mcp.ToolService_tmp
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 */
classData.description: Shared service for managing, listing, calling, and validating MCP tools. Can be instantiated by both MCP Servers (with OpenAPI spec) and MCP Clients.
classData.name: ToolService_tmp

classData.comment:
/**
         * @member {String} className='Neo.ai.mcp.ToolService'
         * @protected
         */
classData.name: className

classData.comment:

         * @member {String|null} openApiFilePath=null
         */
classData.name: openApiFilePath

classData.comment:
/**

         * detail for `getToolHandbook()`.

classData.description: Enables compact tools/list descriptions while preserving full detail for getToolHandbook().
classData.name: compactToolDescriptions

classData.comment:

classData.comment:
/**

classData.comment:
/**
     * Provides a paginated list of available tools.
     * @param {Object} [options]
     * @param {Number} [options.cursor=0]
     * @param {Number} [options.limit]
     * @returns {Object}
     */
classData.description: Provides a paginated list of available tools.
classData.name: listTools

classData.summary: Returns the server-declared harness projection policy.
classData.name: getToolProjectionPolicy

classData.summary:
Returns tools visible through an explicit projection context.
No context means the existing developer/operator surface stays full.
classData.name: getToolsForProjection

classData.comment:
/**
     * @summary Throws when a tool is not visible through the supplied projection context.
     * @param {String}             toolName
     * @param {Object|String|null} toolProjection
     */
classData.summary: Throws when a tool is not visible through the supplied projection context.
classData.name: assertToolProjectionAllows

classData.summary: Normalizes the projection context passed by a server boundary.
classData.name: normalizeToolProjectionContext

classData.comment:
/**
     * @summary Applies the OpenAPI-root harness projection policy to one tool.
     * Unknown projection modes and missing tiers fail closed.
     * @param {String} toolName
     * @param {Object} context
     * @returns {Boolean}
     * @protected
     */
classData.summary:
Applies the OpenAPI-root harness projection policy to one tool.
Unknown projection modes and missing tiers fail closed.
classData.name: isToolAllowedForProjection
